diff:
diff --git a/src/main.py b/src/main.py
index abcdef..12345 100644
--- a/src/main.py
+++ b/src/main.py
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@
 def process_data(data):
-    result = data * 2
+    # Add input validation
+    if not isinstance(data, (int, float)):
+        raise TypeError("Input must be numeric")
+    result = float(data) * 2
     return result
title: Add input validation to process_data
description: Added type checking to prevent errors with non-numeric inputs
comments: Should we add more test cases?
summary: Added input validation to process_data function to handle non-numeric inputs
